rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §7.101, which governs the composition and election of the State Board of Education.
quote: Sec. 7.101. COMPOSITION. (a) The State Board of Education is composed of 15 members elected from districts.
_note: No conflict; rule text addresses SBOE composition, unrelated to homestead exemption.
